app.title: PoE2 Waystone & Tablet Search — pick options, get an in-game search regex
result.title: Search string
result.empty: Pick options to build a search string
result.tradeTip: Open these conditions on the official trade site
result.tradeTipSkipped: Open on trade site ({n} option(s) can't be searched there — excluded)
result.importTip: Bring conditions in from a trade search
result.importSkipped: {n} of the trade conditions aren't options in this app, so they weren't imported.
filter.mode.or.tip: Any one of the selected options
group.noUnique: {type} tablets have no exclusive options. Use the shared options below.
favs.title: Favourites
favs.emptyAll: Use ＋ to make a group and save your searches
favs.emptyGroup: Use + Add in a group to save the current search
load.title: Load favourite
deleteGroup.title: Delete group
deleteGroup.message: Delete '{name}' and the {n} favourite(s) inside it?
settings.title: Settings
settings.siteDesc: The server the “Trade” button opens. Independent of language
settings.resetFavWinDesc: Back to the default size (480×840) and bottom-right position
settings.resetOptPrefsDesc: Undo every reorder and hide you made
credits.title: About · Credits
credits.copyright.1: Path of Exile 2 and all item/currency images and names are copyright Grinding Gear Games.
credits.copyright.2: This is an unofficial fan-made tool and is not affiliated with GGG.
credits.data.1: Option data and currency images: poe2db.tw
credits.issues: Report a bug · request a feature (GitHub Issues)
import.title: Import from the trade site
import.drag: Drag the button below onto your bookmarks bar.
import.dragAlt: If dragging doesn’t work, hit “Copy code”, create a new bookmark, and paste it into its URL field. (The bookmark’s URL field — not the address bar.)
import.dragTip: Drag me onto your bookmarks bar
import.s2a: Search on the trade site as usual.
import.s2b: On that page, click the 「{name}」 bookmark.
import.s2c: This app opens with those conditions already applied. Done!
import.note: It only reads values already shown on the trade page — no request is sent to the trade server. So it always works, with no rate limits.
import.alert: Please click this on a trade search page.
